text: Thank you for calling Speedy Auto Repair, this is Michael speaking. How can I help you today?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Hi Michael, this is Paul Wright. I hope you’re doing well!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Hi Paul! I'm doing great, thanks for asking. How about you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: I'm doing well, thanks! I wanted to check on scheduling an oil change for my car.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Sure thing! When were you thinking of coming in?
segments.speaker: local party

text: How about this Saturday? Is that possible?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, we’re open from 9 AM to 4 PM on Saturdays. What time works for you?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Could I do 10 AM?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! I’ll schedule you for 10 AM on Saturday for an oil change.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Great! Just to confirm, is it still $40 to $60 for the oil change?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, it is, depending on the type of oil we use. I can explain that more when you come in.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect! I also wanted to ask about the brake inspection. My brakes have been making a weird sound.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: A brake inspection is $30 and takes about 30 minutes. Would you like to add that to your appointment?
segments.speaker: local party

text: Yes, please! That sounds like a good idea.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Great! So we have you down for an oil change and brake inspection at 10 AM on Saturday.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Awesome! By the way, could you give me a rough estimate for any potential brake repairs?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Brake repairs can range widely, typically from $150 to $400 depending on the issue.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Okay, thanks for the info. I appreciate that.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Of course! If we find any problems, I’ll provide a detailed quote before proceeding.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Sounds good. I like how you always explain everything in detail.
segments.speaker: remote party

text: I’m glad to hear that, Paul! Customer education is a priority for us.
segments.speaker: local party

text: One last thing, do you have any recommendations for tire rotation soon?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Yes, we recommend having your tires rotated every 5,000 to 7,000 miles. It’s $25 here.
segments.speaker: local party

text: That sounds reasonable. Maybe I can do that next time?
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Absolutely! We can schedule that during your next visit.
segments.speaker: local party

text: Perfect. Thanks, Michael! I’ll see you on Saturday!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: You’re welcome, Paul! Looking forward to seeing you then. Have a great day!
segments.speaker: local party

text: You too! Bye!
segments.speaker: remote party

text: Bye!
segments.speaker: local party
